data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an audit trail with IP address and timestamp, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or that it has been tested. The linked use case specifies the need for an audit trail, yet the evidence does not include any checks or API reads that would demonstrate compliance with this requirement. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for audit trail functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.
